acceptance_criteria: Subscribe/unsubscribe commands work; multi-stream subscription works; heartbeat every 15s; invalid commands ignored; disconnect cleans up all subscriptions
description:
Implement WebSocket streaming endpoint. Client sends JSON commands: {type:'subscribe', stream:'user'} and {type:'unsubscribe', stream:'user'}. Server sends events as {stream:['user'], event:'update', payload:'{...}'}. Multiple stream subscriptions per connection. Heartbeat: server sends {event:'ping'} every 15s. Elk and some other clients prefer WebSocket over SSE.

AGENT WORKFLOW: Spawn a research subagent to connect to mastodon.social WebSocket endpoint and capture real subscribe/event/heartbeat messages as oracle.

TEST DISCIPLINE:
- Subscribe to 'user' stream → receive update events for followed account posts
- Subscribe to multiple streams → events from both streams received
- Unsubscribe → events from that stream stop
- Heartbeat ping: received every 15s
- Invalid command type → ignored gracefully (no disconnect)
- auth: Bearer token in Authorization header on the initial HTTP upgrade

DEFENSIVE PROGRAMMING:
- WebSocket frame size limit: reject frames > 64KB to prevent memory exhaustion
- Handle partial/fragmented WebSocket messages correctly (axum WS handles this but verify)
- Client disconnect: drop all subscriptions for that connection
title: GET /api/v1/streaming: WebSocket with subscribe/unsubscribe commands
